title: Astronome
notes:
Magick is the science of causing change to occur by means of one's will.

Dedicated to
Antonin Artaud ~ Edgard Varèse ~ Aleister Crowley

Packaging includes: 
1 booklet (16 pages) of notes and artwork;
1 booklet (48 pages) of notes and artwork;
Sleeve for CD housed in square cardboard box (with release notes on inner sides of box).+ Oversized obi
